variant_notes.latin_american: Dominates Americas; 'ustedes' plural; vocab e.g. 'computadora', 'carro', 'celular'; neutral often used for broad reach (ATA).
variant_notes.castilian: Spain: 'vosotros', 'ordenador', 'coche', 'móvil'; ceceo/theta in some; more formal media tone.

register_system: Tú (informal/peers), Usted (formal/respect); voseo regional in LatAm; written uses heavy subjunctive/formality. Translators err: ignoring audience (e.g. tú in Mexico business offends) or over-formalizing (stiffness).
translationese_traps: Literal calques ('en el caso de' vs natural); passive/reflexive overuse; false friends (actualmente=currently; realizar=perform); Baker collocation/ser-estar mismatches; Venuti 'doughy' domestication failures.

document_conventions.legal: Civil law; long/repetitive for precision; notarized; jurisdiction-specific terms (ICR/ATA challenges vs English common law).
document_conventions.business: Polite formulas/salutations; DD/MM/YYYY; neutral vocab for intl.

return_to_original_risks: Formality/variant drift in EN edit; regional vocab/idiom erasure; anglicisms or subjunctive loss on back-translation; highest in legal term re-insertion.
idiom_mapping_notes: Functional/dynamic equivalence (Nida/Baker priority over literal); clusters (food/emotion/business proverbs e.g. 'poner los puntos sobre las íes' -> clarify); domesticate for target fluency (Venuti) unless literary foreignization.
tutoring_pronunciation_hooks: Trilled 'rr' vs flap 'r' (practice 'perro'); clear open vowels no reduction; regional 'll/y' or ceceo; syllable-timed rhythm.
orthography_notes: Acute accents (stress/meaning e.g. papa/papá); ñ; inverted ¿¡; RAE standard with minor regional lexical diffs.
professional_resources: Real Academia Española (DLE/DPD); ATA Spanish cert/guidelines; Fundéu; Baker 'In Other Words'; Venuti applications; bilingual legal glossaries.
